meaning: n.林荫道,大街,方法,途径,路
examples: He walked up Fifth Avenue to clear his head.
Lily lives in a penthouse just off Park Avenue.
Bergdorf Goodman has opened a men's shop on Fifth Avenue.
Madison Avenue giants are scrambling to find new ways to deliver their products to ad-drenched consumers.
The regular Sunday concerts start at 4 pm at 555 Edgecombe Avenue, apt 3F.
